info.name: Jada Agent
info.summary: AI Agent powered by Hermes — autonomous tasks, workspaces, MCP tools, and Telegram bot
info.description:
**Jada Agent** brings autonomous AI agent capabilities to your Nextcloud, powered by [Hermes](https://github.com/itsablabla/jada-agent) — the GARZA OS super agent backend.
### Features
- **Workspaces** — Organize conversations by project (Kuse, Nomad Internet, GARZA OS, etc.) - **Chat** — Full-page AI chat with SSE streaming and inline tool-call visualization - **MCP Tools** — 406+ tools across 6 servers (Nextcloud, Composio, Kuse, Vault, ProtonMail, Rube) - **Telegram Bot** — Same agent, same conversation memory, native Telegram formatting - **Document Editor** — AI-assisted document editing with inline suggestions - **Per-User Isolation** — Each Nextcloud user gets isolated chat history and workspaces
### Architecture
- **Hermes Backend** — Native Hermes Agent with built-in context compression (Docker, port 3200) - **Telegram Bot** — Separate container sharing Hermes conversation memory - **Nextcloud App** — Vue.js 3 frontend + PHP proxy controllers
### Requirements
- Hermes backend (bundled Docker Compose in `backend/`) - OpenRouter API key (or any OpenAI-compatible provider)
info.author: Garza OS
